features.name: parameter with numeric constant default
features.description: Code should include a module parameter with a numeric constant default value (e.g., 32'd36)

features.name: constant concatenation in expression
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a parameter with itself used in a constant expression

features.name: bit-select with constant index expression
features.description: Code should include a bit-select using a constant expression as the index (e.g., id_1[expr])

features.name: bit-select range with non-equality comparison
features.description: Code should include a bit-select range using a non-equality operator (!==) on a bit-select result

features.name: procedural assignment in initial block
features.description: Code should include a procedural non-blocking assignment (<=) inside an initial block
features.snippet:
initial begin
  if (id_1) begin
    if (id_1[(id_1[1'b0-{id_1, id_1} : id_1]!==id_1) : id_1]) id_1 <= 1;
  end
end
